policy.note: This brief presents the final owner decision choices. It does not apply any choice.

owner_prompt.question: Welchen Source-Root-Entscheid soll Kosmo jetzt verwenden?
owner_prompt.safe_default: Wenn du nicht 100% sicher bist, waehle repair_onedrive_first oder keep_blocked.
owner_prompt.exact_unlock_warning: Die unlockende Option darf nur verwendet werden, wenn der angezeigte Pfad exakt die vollstaendige private Architekturquelle ist.

answer_choices.label: Keep source-root blocked
answer_choices.when_to_use: Owner is not ready to identify the complete private architecture library root.

answer_choices.label: Repair OneDrive first
answer_choices.when_to_use: Owner says the intended source root is a OneDrive mirror but sync markers/completeness are not resolved.

answer_choices.label: Select visible exact root for metadata diagnostic
answer_choices.when_to_use: Owner/KosmoOverseer explicitly confirms this exact path is the complete private source root for metadata-only diagnostics.
answer_choices.caution: Visible archive subtree; owner/overseer may confirm this exact path before diagnostics.

visible_source_root_candidates.recommended_action: Treat as workflow/context mirror first; only select as source root if owner explicitly confirms it contains the complete private architecture library.
Treat as KosmoAsset/material-library candidate; do not use as the main architecture reference root without owner confirmation.

Keep blocked unless owner/overseer confirms this exact path as the real source root.
Treat as OneDrive mirror candidate; confirm completeness and sync health before any private metadata inventory.
Treat as workflow/context mirror first; only select as source root if owner explicitly confirms it contains the complete private architecture library.

Mount or expose the real archive/OneDrive library root, then rerun locator and private-library diagnostic.
Resolve OneDrive sync error roots before using visible OneDrive mirrors for inventory.

hard_stops: Do not edit the decision session from this brief without explicit owner confirmation.
Do not run private metadata inventory while private_diagnostic_allowed is false.
Do not run OCR/PDF extraction from private sources at this stage.
Do not set public-ready from this source-root decision.
